name: PT Trias Sentosa Tbk
summary: PT Trias Sentosa Tbk engages in the manufacture and trading of plastic packaging materials in Indonesia Japan, rest of Asia, the United States, Australia, Europe, and internationally. The company manufactures and sells biaxially oriented polypropylene (BOPP) and biaxially oriented polyester (BOPET) films and plastics; and offers solutions of plastic packaging products. Its BOPP and BOPET products include printing and lamination, overwrap, anti-fog, matte, pearlized, white opaque, label, metallized, coated, heat sealable, and thermal film products. The company's products are used for food packaging; tobacco and box overwraps; anti-fog bags for vegetables, fresh fruits, and salad; paper look packaging and paper lamination; clear, white, and metallized label packaging; and ice cream, candy, and soap packaging. It is also involved in the investment, trading, import, export, distribution, and other activities. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Sidoarjo, Indonesia.
